footer.subtitle: Electronic Observatory for the Fight against Violence against Women and Children
footer.copyright: © {{year}} MARA - Burkina Faso. All rights reserved.

home.heroDesc: MARA is the Electronic Observatory for the Fight against Violence against Women and Children in Burkina Faso. Report, learn, find help.
home.howHelpDesc: Tools designed to protect, inform and support
home.featureReportDesc: Report violence anonymously and confidentially. Every report is treated with the utmost care.
home.featureChatDesc: Talk in real time with trained counsellors. 100% anonymous and confidential.
home.featureResourcesDesc: Legal guides, articles, training and information about your rights.
home.featureDirectoryDesc: Find support services near you: NGOs, police, hospitals, lawyers.
home.featureProDesc: Tools for professionals and counsellors for case follow-up.
home.tutorialsDesc: Watch these short videos to learn how to use MARA, even without being able to read.
home.tutoReportDesc: Learn to file a report in a few simple steps, by text or by voice message.
home.tutoChatDesc: Discover how to chat anonymously with a counsellor, by text or by voice.
home.tutoTrackDesc: Track the status of your report using your reference and visual indicators.

login.title: Professional Area
login.subtitle: Log in to access the dashboard

register.title: Create an account
register.subtitle: Join the MARA team
register.name: Full name
register.alreadyAccount: Already have an account? Log in

report.title: Report violence
report.subtitle: Your report is confidential and secure
report.violenceTypeError: Select at least one type of violence
report.descriptionPlaceholder: Describe the facts in as much detail as possible (minimum 10 characters)...
report.descriptionError: Description must contain at least 10 characters
report.descriptionOrVoiceError: Please provide a written description (min. 10 characters) or record a voice note
report.voiceHint: You can record a voice note to complement or replace the written description.
report.voiceMicError: Unable to access microphone. Please grant permission.
report.dangerWarning: This report will be treated as a priority. In case of immediate emergency, call 17.
report.contactOptional: This information is optional but allows our teams to contact you back if necessary.
report.submitError: Error submitting report. Please try again.
report.successMsg: Keep this reference to track the progress of your report. You can check it at any time.
report.urgentMsg: This report has been flagged as urgent.
report.urgentCallMsg: In case of immediate danger, call 17 (Police) or 80 00 11 52 (MARA Green Line).

chat.title: Confidential chat
chat.subtitle: Chat anonymously with a trained counsellor. Your conversation is secure and confidential.
chat.advisorWillReply: A counsellor will reply to you
chat.voiceMicError: Unable to access microphone. Please grant permission.

resources.title: Resources & Information
resources.subtitle: Guides, articles, laws and training to inform and protect you
resources.listenHelp: For people who cannot read, listen to the audio content.

tracking.title: Track my report
tracking.subtitle: Enter your reference to see the status of your report
tracking.notFound: No report found with this reference. Please check and try again.
tracking.serverError: Server connection error. Please try again.

explanations.nouveau: Your report has been received and is awaiting a professional to take charge.
explanations.en_cours: A professional is currently reviewing your report and will take appropriate measures.
explanations.urgent: Your report has been prioritised due to its urgent nature. If you are in danger, call 17.
explanations.resolu: Your report has been processed and the necessary measures have been taken.
explanations.cloture: This case has been closed. Contact us if you have new information.
